TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Laiyi a sakuwan ku Pingtung. kumud nu kalesakan, 162.27 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 70.84 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 86.37 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 7,556 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,230 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 7,327 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 97%(Paiwan) ku kasabinawlan. u Paiwan ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Laiyi mala 7 a cuwen atu 10 ku niyazu'. kina 10 a niyazu'sa, Kuljaljau , Vungalid , Payljus , Calasiv , Tjuwaqau , Siljevavav , Tjana'asiya , Pucunug , Tjalja'avus , Takamimura . Laiyi akuwan Paiwan a kamu Rai, tini i Taywan labu nu Ping-tung akuwan tawalian i tepang, nuamis nacapi i Taiwu a kenis, nuwalian, nuwalian macapi i Taitung akuwan Daren a kenis, Jinfeng a kenis, nutipan macapi ku Wanluan a kenis, Sin-py a kenis, nutipan nutimulan patatuling tu Fang-kiaw a kenis, mitulaes tu timulan tu Zung-za a kenis, tademaw izaw ku 7.4 melebu a tademaw, uyza u Ping-tungay akuwan a katuuday i buyu'ay a binacadan u sakatusa u katuuday a tademaw, "uyni dada'", uynuan a kenis angangan u Paiwan a binacadan, uyza amih a kanatal u pikawawan u angangan. Laiyi mala 7 a cuwen atu 10 ku niyazu'. kina 10 a niyazu'sa, Kuljaljau , Vungalid , Payljus , Calasiv , Tjuwaqau , Siljevavav , Tjana'asiya , Pucunug , Tjalja'avus , Takamimura . laylay Laiyi akuwan i liwliw nu kauzipan tungusay u Paiwan a bina cadan, i tini ilalabu tungusay tusaay a sakalaliyas tu cacay šłÄVuculj"ŚłÉśõĻÁąĺšļěśóŹ"angangan i tepangay Pavuwavuwa a kasabinacadan. i zikuzan a Lipunan a ziday tungusay u A-heu-ting atu Kaw-sung akenis. śąįŚĺĆŚąĚśúüŚú®tjalja'vus" "(ŚÖßRai‚ÜíšĺÜÁĺ©Rai'I), . kalingatuan a ngangayaw hawsa tini i tjalja'vus a niyazu'an, malumanay a nuyazu' u "malumadan Laiyi a niyazu'", Layak a ngangan u Rai, patizeng tu Yakuba, panutek tu ngangan "Laiyi akuwan han " Rai‚ÜíRai'I", pasakenis nu Takaway a kuwan. 1950 a mihcaan pasumat han tu Pin-tung a kuwan ayza. hekal nu zazan liwliw nu lala' u kakitizaan pasay Cung-yan a buyu' nutipan, palecad tu talakaw 300 depah a katalakaw, lalabu nu kenis talakaw ku buyu' i lalabu ku helung, u lala' talakaw a puyu', u akutu'ay sibaliay a demiad. u culil nu nanum Laiyi akuwan izwa ku Se a sauwac, wa-lu-se a sauwac, Cen-taw-wey a sauwac, Li-li a sauwac atu yadahay a sauwac papabesul ku sauwac, angangan a sauwac u Lin-pian sauwac, u lalekalan nu Tay-u a kenis Nan-ta-u a buyu' nutepan nutimulan a zazan, i papaw nu sauwac u Wa-lu-se a sauwac i Laiyi a tabakiay a capi nu sangaw makay nuwalian malikit tayza i Lay-se a sauwac masaupu pasatipan tu nutumulan, sazikuzay i Dan-lin a tabakuiay a tapiingan a sangaw izaw sakatahekal nu helung pasaetip pasatimul nu likit nu natum. mikawaway tu kawaw nu kanatal a kakitazaan kenis śĚĎťÉ®ŤźĹŚŹ§ś®ďśĚĎŚŹ§ś®ď (Kuljaljau)śúõŚėČśĚĎśúõŚėČ (Vungalid)ŚćóŚíĆśĚĎťęėŤ¶č (Takamimura)ÁôĹť∑ļ (Payljus)šłĻśěóśĚĎšłĻśěó (Calasiv)ŚĖúś®āÁôľÁôľŚźĺ (Siljevavav)Áĺ©śěóśĚĎÁĺ©śěó (Tjanaqasiya)Ś§ßŚĺĆ (Tjuwaqau)śĖáś®āśĚĎśĖáś®ā (Pucunug)šĺÜÁĺ©śĚĎŚÖßÁ§ĺ/šĺÜÁĺ©(Tjaljaqavus) (Kuljaljau)śúõŚėČśĚĎśúõŚėČ (Vungalid)ŚćóŚíĆśĚĎťęėŤ¶č (Takamimura)ÁôĹť∑ļ (Payljus)šłĻśěóśĚĎšłĻśěó (Calasiv)ŚĖúś®āÁôľÁôľŚźĺ (Siljevavav)Áĺ©śěóśĚĎÁĺ©śěó (Tjanaqasiya)Ś§ßŚĺĆ (Tjuwaqau)śĖáś®āśĚĎśĖáś®ā (Pucunug)šĺÜÁĺ©śĚĎŚÖßÁ§ĺ/šĺÜÁĺ©(Tjaljaqavus) nuzikuzan nu Pa-pa a baliyus a satebuc, Layyi nuwalian nutipan, Yi-lin, Ta-hu, Da-hu, Si-le-ba-ba-ba-wu "Dan-lin-cun 6-6 lin" niyazu' babulaw tayza i Sin-pi-sing a niyazu' sa, mabulaw tu Sin-pi a kenis Ban-zun a nuyazu'nutimulan dadipasan a pahutingan, pangangan han "Laiyi akuwan han ", uyniay a niyazu' a Bay-ti "nayey ku kulit s aulit." aidangan a nilaculan kasumamadan a luma' a kenis nu tuas a luma' Paiwan a binacadan kasumamadan a niyazu' "mal jeveq a pilisin"(śéíÁĀ£śóŹŚŹ§ś®ďťÉ®ŤźĹmal jeveqšļĒŚĻīÁ•≠) Dan-lin u cuyavuy, Pan-lin sakacascas i papaw nu Laiyi Lin-pan a sauwac Dan-lin piidangan u pilabinan a niyazu' Ta-zaw-cow u tademawan a taku"macapi ku Ku-lou a niyzau', tatengaay tini labu nu Sin-pi a kenis" Ta-hou a sauwac Yung-yang a cascas Laiyi tabakiay a helung Wang-yia, Wen-le u nusubelidan a tuud tu malumanay a niyazu' caay paazih Wan-yiya u pananulas u ngiha' Wen-le izaw ku adipangpang a helun kasumamadan nu malumanay a niyazu' kakitizaan pikayakayan tu buyu' a zazan a sakayakay Bang-ci a buyu' a pipazengan piazihan kasumamadan a tuud šļĆŚ≥įŚú≥ Paywan a binacadan u bihit nitutukan tu bitekan piidangan nu aadihan atu nu laylayay a nalaculan nu kasumamadan a kenis nu niyazu'ay sitaasay a lima' Paywan a binacadan u nu kasumamadan aniyazu' "mal jeveq" lima a mihcaan ku lisin (śéíÁĀ£śóŹŚŹ§ś®ďťÉ®ŤźĹmal jeveqšļĒŚĻīÁ•≠) Tan-lin nu micuyacuyay a sangaw, Tan-lin a masacascasay Laiyi i papaw nu Laiyi Lin-pan a sauwac Tan-lin pipahanhanan a aidangan Ta-hu-cew nu nalimaan anisanga tu taku "micapi tu sumamadan a niyazu', tatengaay tu i Sin-pimaylabuay a kenis" Tabakuay zukuzanay a sauwac kasasumidangn a cascas Laiyi Wang-ciy Wen-le kasumamadang Wang-ciy u śúõŚėČŚõěťü≥Ťį∑ Wen-le nu adibabangan a dadipisan nu kasumamadanŚŹ§ś®ďŤąäťÉ®ŤźĹťĀļŚĚÄ nu kasumamadan a kenis u sakatabuyu' a caculilan Ben-ci a buyu' kenis nu Pingtung i a kenis u nu banacadan a nalaylayan a luma' El-bun a cilisšļĆŚ≥įŚú≥ nu malumanay a kitizaan nu Paiwam a binacadan u bihit nu tademaw nidukdukan kananecan habayŚįŹÁĪ≥ cukanaŤäíśěú taliŤäčť†≠ kalitangŤäĪÁĒü tubahÁĒėŤó∑ susiziwÁõłśÄĚś®Ļ kamulś≤Ļś°ź daungś®ĻŤĪÜ u adasayan, Paiwan a kamu "Cinavu". i paylabu nu Paywan a kamu u tatangsayan u papah ku sapitabu u kakanan a tuud, u nu sapilisin aca a kakanan kuyni, u nu hapay, titi, tali ku satabu nu papah, kaw u nu hinalitih ku sasapisiket, huthuten taneng tu mukan, . izaw "ku nu Yun-ci-min a lalibungbung"saan. u nalimaan atu nituktukan nu Paywan a binacadan nu malumanay a kitizaan nu Paiwam a binacadan u bihit nu tademaw nidukdukan Qaqqayaman sasalisinan nu lim' i Wang-ciy malumanay a kenis hamin nu niyazu' tu sasalisinan a kakitizaan, yumahida Ci-mu a tademaw u lalekaln nu lala', sakay nu tawyaay nu nuyazu'ay paylabuay a pasing, u Ci-mu a tademaw dada' ku itiza misalisin a patungus, u mapalaway nu Paywan a binacadan ku tayzaay i sasalisinan a kakitizaan, miazih tu sasalisinan a luma' nulabuay u kuleng sasupet sakay u mahiniay a kawaw. u sibung nisalima'an a luma', qaqqayaman u salisinanay i luma'ay atu nu Lipunay a tayling a kakitizaan, u laed nu cacudadan u sakalalacalan, u daduducan nu casumamadan u paysinnan nu kakitizaan. u salisinan a luma' izaw ku cacayay masawahelulay nu ba'tu anicikcikan nisangaan u ahebal 2.4 mi, u labu 2.4 mi, u talakaw nu tetek 1.3 mi. sacumud i saamisan ku panan, i labu sa u naynayi' ku hica, nayi' ku nisalikliktan tu tuud nu nipazengan. . masazumaay a liwliw, sakay i kalimucu' satipan nu timulan izaw ku kibetulay tu 0.1 mi,masacacay i buyu' nu tebal nu salining sakusaan tu nupatizengan tu nu ba'tuay a sapal kusapisalining, i pabaw izaw ku nu tutukan tu masamataay nu tangah a tademaw. u salisinan a luma' tepal nu liwliw yumahiza kunikasaan 0.8 mi ku talakaw ani cikcikan tu ba'tu, nu lining masaliwit. saamisan izaw ku liwan nu cacayan ku sakatalabuan taeng sakatayza i niyazu'an a lumaluma'an.
S.PHON: r~…ĺaiji a sakuwan ku piŇčtuŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paiwan) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paiwan ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan r~…ĺaiji mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, kur~…ĺjar~…ĺjau , *uŇčar~…ĺid , pajr~…ĺjus , ¶ar~…ĺasi* , tjuwa*au , sir~…ĺj…ô*a*a* , tjana Ē~ °asija , pu ¶unug , tjar~…ĺja Ē~ °a*us , takamimura . r~…ĺaiji akuwan paiwan a kamu *ai, tini i tajwan r~…ĺabu nu piŇč-tuŇč akuwan tawar~…ĺian i t…ôpaŇč, nuamis na ¶api i taiwu a k…ônis, nuwar~…ĺian, nuwar~…ĺian ma ¶api i taituŇč akuwan dar…ôn a k…ônis, *inf…ôŇč a k…ônis, nutipan ma ¶api ku wanr~…ĺuan a k…ônis, sin-pj a k…ônis, nutipan nutimur~…ĺan patatur~…ĺiŇč tu faŇč-kiaw a k…ônis, mitur~…ĺa…ôs tu timur~…ĺan tu zuŇč-za a k…ônis, tad…ômaw izaw ku *.* nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° u kakitizaan pasaj ¶uŇč-jan a buju Ē~ ° nutipan, par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu tar~…ĺakaw *** d…ôpańß a katar~…ĺakaw, r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu k…ônis tar~…ĺakaw ku buju Ē~ ° i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu ku ńß…ôr~…ĺuŇč, dan-r~…ĺin a tabakuiaj a tapiiŇčan a saŇčaw izaw sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ńß…ôr~…ĺuŇč pasa…ôtip pasatimur~…ĺ nu r~…ĺikit nu natum. mikawawaj tu kawaw nu kanatar~…ĺ a kakitazaan k…ônis ******** pa-pa a bar~…ĺijus a sat…ôbu ¶, r~…ĺajji nuwar~…ĺian nutipan, ji-r~…ĺin, ta-ńßu, da-ńßu, si-r~…ĺ…ô-ba-ba-ba-wu "dan-r~…ĺin- ¶un *-* r~…ĺin" nijazu Ē~ ° babur~…ĺaw tajza i sin-pi-siŇč a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, mabur~…ĺaw tu sin-pi a k…ônis ban-zun a nujazu Ē~ °nutimur~…ĺan dadipasan a pańßutiŇčan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan "r~…ĺaiji akuwan ńßan ", ujniaj a nijazu Ē~ ° a baj-ti "naj…ô ku kur~…ĺit s aur~…ĺit." aidaŇčan a nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan kasumamadan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a k…ônis nu tuas a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° paiwan a bina ¶adan kasumamadan a nijazu Ē~ ° "mar~…ĺ j…ô*…ô* a pir~…ĺisin"(*******mar~…ĺ j…ô*…ô****) dan-r~…ĺin u ¶uja*uj, pan-r~…ĺin saka ¶as ¶as i papaw nu r~…ĺaiji r~…ĺin-pan a sauwa ¶ dan-r~…ĺin piidaŇčan u pir~…ĺabinan a nijazu Ē~ ° ta-zaw- ¶ow u tad…ômawan a taku"ma ¶api ku ku-r~…ĺou a nijzau Ē~ °, tat…ôŇčaaj tini r~…ĺabu nu sin-pi a k…ônis" ta-ńßou a sauwa ¶ juŇč-jaŇč a ¶as ¶as r~…ĺaiji tabakiaj a ńß…ôr~…ĺuŇč waŇč-jia, w…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô u nusub…ôr~…ĺidan a tuud tu mar~…ĺumanaj a nijazu Ē~ ° ¶aaj paazińß wan-jija u pananur~…ĺas u Ňčińßa Ē~ ° w…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô izaw ku adipaŇčpaŇč a ńß…ôr~…ĺun kasumamadan nu mar~…ĺumanaj a nijazu Ē~ ° kakitizaan pikajakajan tu buju Ē~ ° a zazan a sakajakaj baŇč- ¶i a buju Ē~ ° a pipaz…ôŇčan piazińßan kasumamadan a tuud *** pajwan a bina ¶adan u bińßit nitutukan tu bit…ôkan piidaŇčan nu aadińßan atu nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺajaj a nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nu kasumamadan a k…ônis nu nijazu Ē~ °aj sitaasaj a r~…ĺima Ē~ ° pajwan a bina ¶adan u nu kasumamadan anijazu Ē~ ° "mar~…ĺ j…ô*…ô*" r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan ku r~…ĺisin (*******mar~…ĺ j…ô*…ô****) tan-r~…ĺin nu mi ¶uja ¶ujaj a saŇčaw, tan-r~…ĺin a masa ¶as ¶asaj r~…ĺaiji i papaw nu r~…ĺaiji r~…ĺin-pan a sauwa ¶ tan-r~…ĺin pipańßanńßanan a aidaŇčan ta-ńßu- ¶…ôw nu nar~…ĺimaan anisaŇča tu taku "mi ¶api tu sumamadan a nijazu Ē~ °, tat…ôŇčaaj tu i sin-pimajr~…ĺabuaj a k…ônis" tabakuaj zukuzanaj a sauwa ¶ kasasumidaŇčn a ¶as ¶as r~…ĺaiji waŇč- ¶ij w…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô kasumamadaŇč waŇč- ¶ij u ***** w…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô nu adibabaŇčan a dadipisan nu kasumamadan******* nu kasumamadan a k…ônis u sakatabuju Ē~ ° a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan b…ôn- ¶i a buju Ē~ ° k…ônis nu piŇčtuŇč i a k…ônis u nu bana ¶adan a nar~…ĺajr~…ĺajan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° …ôr~…ĺ-bun a ¶ir~…ĺis*** nu mar~…ĺumanaj a kitizaan nu paiwam a bina ¶adan u bińßit nu tad…ômaw nidukdukan kanan…ô ¶an ńßabaj** ¶ukana** tar~…ĺi** kar~…ĺitaŇč** tubańß** susiziw*** kamur~…ĺ** dauŇč** u adasajan, paiwan a kamu " ¶ina*u". i pajr~…ĺabu nu pajwan a kamu u tataŇčsajan u papańß ku sapitabu u kakanan a tuud, u nu sapir~…ĺisin a ¶a a kakanan kujni, u nu ńßapaj, titi, tar~…ĺi ku satabu nu papańß, kaw u nu ńßinar~…ĺitińß ku sasapisik…ôt, ńßutńßut…ôn tan…ôŇč tu mukan, . izaw "ku nu jun- ¶i-min a r~…ĺar~…ĺibuŇčbuŇč"saan. u nar~…ĺimaan atu nituktukan nu pajwan a bina ¶adan nu mar~…ĺumanaj a kitizaan nu paiwam a bina ¶adan u bińßit nu tad…ômaw nidukdukan *a**ajaman sasar~…ĺisinan nu r~…ĺim Ē~ ° i waŇč- ¶ij mar~…ĺumanaj a k…ônis ńßamin nu nijazu Ē~ ° tu sasar~…ĺisinan a kakitizaan, jumańßida ¶i-mu a tad…ômaw u r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺn nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, sakaj nu tawjaaj nu nujazu Ē~ °aj pajr~…ĺabuaj a pasiŇč, u ¶i-mu a tad…ômaw dada Ē~ ° ku itiza misar~…ĺisin a patuŇčus, u mapar~…ĺawaj nu pajwan a bina ¶adan ku tajzaaj i sasar~…ĺisinan a kakitizaan, miazińß tu sasar~…ĺisinan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nur~…ĺabuaj u kur~…ĺ…ôŇč sasup…ôt sakaj u mańßiniaj a kawaw. u sibuŇč nisar~…ĺima Ē~ °an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, *a**ajaman u sar~…ĺisinanaj i r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj atu nu r~…ĺipunaj a tajr~…ĺiŇč a kakitizaan, u r~…ĺa…ôd nu ¶a ¶udadan u sakar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺan, u dadudu ¶an nu ¶asumamadan u pajsinnan nu kakitizaan. u sar~…ĺisinan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° izaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj masawańß…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺaj nu ba Ē~ °tu ani ¶ik ¶ikan nisaŇčaan u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ *.* mi, u r~…ĺabu *.* mi, u tar~…ĺakaw nu t…ôt…ôk *.* mi. sa ¶umud i saamisan ku panan, i r~…ĺabu sa u najnaji Ē~ ° ku ńßi ¶a, naji Ē~ ° ku nisar~…ĺikr~…ĺiktan tu tuud nu nipaz…ôŇčan. . masazumaaj a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, sakaj i kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° satipan nu timur~…ĺan izaw ku kib…ôtur~…ĺaj tu *.* mi,masa ¶a ¶aj i buju Ē~ ° nu t…ôbar~…ĺ nu sar~…ĺiniŇč sakusaan tu nupatiz…ôŇčan tu nu ba Ē~ °tuaj a sapar~…ĺ kusapisar~…ĺiniŇč, i pabaw izaw ku nu tutukan tu masamataaj nu taŇčańß a tad…ômaw. u sar~…ĺisinan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° t…ôpar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw jumańßiza kunikasaan *.* mi ku tar~…ĺakaw ani ¶ik ¶ikan tu ba Ē~ °tu, nu r~…ĺiniŇč masar~…ĺiwit. saamisan izaw ku r~…ĺiwan nu ¶a ¶ajan ku sakatar~…ĺabuan ta…ôŇč sakatajza i nijazu Ē~ °an a r~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an.
S.FORM: Laiyi a sakuwan ku Pingtung. kumud nu kalesakan, 162.27 km¬≤. (kalesakan nu linpanti 70.84 km¬≤, kalesakan nu pawliwti 86.37 km¬≤), u kasabinawlan, 7,556 ku tademaw. u kasalumaluma' sa, 2,230 ku luma'. ilabu nu kasaniyazu' nu siyang sa, 7,327 ku ingcumin a tademaw. u kasabinawlan, Pakalatu 97%(Paiwan) ku kasabinawlan. u Paiwan ku sakalaniyazu'. nikasakuwakuwan Laiyi mala 7 a cuwen atu 10 ku niyazu'. kina 10 a niyazu'sa, Kuljaljau , Vungalid , Payljus , Calasiv , Tjuwaqau , Siljevavav , Tjana'asiya , Pucunug , Tjalja'avus , Takamimura . Laiyi akuwan Paiwan a kamu Rai, tini i Taywan labu nu Ping-tung akuwan tawalian i tepang, nuamis nacapi i Taiwu a kenis, nuwalian, nuwalian macapi i Taitung akuwan Daren a kenis, Jinfeng a kenis, nutipan macapi ku Wanluan a kenis, Sin-py a kenis, nutipan nutimulan patatuling tu Fang-kiaw a kenis, mitulaes tu timulan tu Zung-za a kenis, tademaw izaw ku 7.4 melebu a tademaw, uyza u Ping-tungay akuwan a katuuday i buyu'ay a binacadan u sakatusa u katuuday a tademaw, "uyni dada'", uynuan a kenis angangan u Paiwan a binacadan, uyza amih a kanatal u pikawawan u angangan. Laiyi mala 7 a cuwen atu 10 ku niyazu'. kina 10 a niyazu'sa, Kuljaljau , Vungalid , Payljus , Calasiv , Tjuwaqau , Siljevavav , Tjana'asiya , Pucunug , Tjalja'avus , Takamimura . laylay Laiyi akuwan i liwliw nu kauzipan tungusay u Paiwan a bina cadan, i tini ilalabu tungusay tusaay a sakalaliyas tu cacay šłÄVuculj"ŚłÉśõĻÁąĺšļěśóŹ"angangan i tepangay Pavuwavuwa a kasabinacadan. i zikuzan a Lipunan a ziday tungusay u A-heu-ting atu Kaw-sung akenis. śąįŚĺĆŚąĚśúüŚú®tjalja'vus" "(ŚÖßRai‚ÜíšĺÜÁĺ©Rai'I), . kalingatuan a ngangayaw hawsa tini i tjalja'vus a niyazu'an, malumanay a nuyazu' u "malumadan Laiyi a niyazu'", Layak a ngangan u Rai, patizeng tu Yakuba, panutek tu ngangan "Laiyi akuwan han " Rai‚ÜíRai'I", pasakenis nu Takaway a kuwan. 1950 a mihcaan pasumat han tu Pin-tung a kuwan ayza. hekal nu zazan liwliw nu lala' u kakitizaan pasay Cung-yan a buyu' nutipan, palecad tu talakaw 300 depah a katalakaw, lalabu nu kenis talakaw ku buyu' i lalabu ku helung, u lala' talakaw a puyu', u akutu'ay sibaliay a demiad. u culil nu nanum Laiyi akuwan izwa ku Se a sauwac, wa-lu-se a sauwac, Cen-taw-wey a sauwac, Li-li a sauwac atu yadahay a sauwac papabesul ku sauwac, angangan a sauwac u Lin-pian sauwac, u lalekalan nu Tay-u a kenis Nan-ta-u a buyu' nutepan nutimulan a zazan, i papaw nu sauwac u Wa-lu-se a sauwac i Laiyi a tabakiay a capi nu sangaw makay nuwalian malikit tayza i Lay-se a sauwac masaupu pasatipan tu nutumulan, sazikuzay i Dan-lin a tabakuiay a tapiingan a sangaw izaw sakatahekal nu helung pasaetip pasatimul nu likit nu natum. mikawaway tu kawaw nu kanatal a kakitazaan kenis śĚĎťÉ®ŤźĹŚŹ§ś®ďśĚĎŚŹ§ś®ď (Kuljaljau)śúõŚėČśĚĎśúõŚėČ (Vungalid)ŚćóŚíĆśĚĎťęėŤ¶č (Takamimura)ÁôĹť∑ļ (Payljus)šłĻśěóśĚĎšłĻśěó (Calasiv)ŚĖúś®āÁôľÁôľŚźĺ (Siljevavav)Áĺ©śěóśĚĎÁĺ©śěó (Tjanaqasiya)Ś§ßŚĺĆ (Tjuwaqau)śĖáś®āśĚĎśĖáś®ā (Pucunug)šĺÜÁĺ©śĚĎŚÖßÁ§ĺ/šĺÜÁĺ©(Tjaljaqavus) (Kuljaljau)śúõŚėČśĚĎśúõŚėČ (Vungalid)ŚćóŚíĆśĚĎťęėŤ¶č (Takamimura)ÁôĹť∑ļ (Payljus)šłĻśěóśĚĎšłĻśěó (Calasiv)ŚĖúś®āÁôľÁôľŚźĺ (Siljevavav)Áĺ©śěóśĚĎÁĺ©śěó (Tjanaqasiya)Ś§ßŚĺĆ (Tjuwaqau)śĖáś®āśĚĎśĖáś®ā (Pucunug)šĺÜÁĺ©śĚĎŚÖßÁ§ĺ/šĺÜÁĺ©(Tjaljaqavus) nuzikuzan nu Pa-pa a baliyus a satebuc, Layyi nuwalian nutipan, Yi-lin, Ta-hu, Da-hu, Si-le-ba-ba-ba-wu "Dan-lin-cun 6-6 lin" niyazu' babulaw tayza i Sin-pi-sing a niyazu' sa, mabulaw tu Sin-pi a kenis Ban-zun a nuyazu'nutimulan dadipasan a pahutingan, pangangan han "Laiyi akuwan han ", uyniay a niyazu' a Bay-ti "nayey ku kulit s aulit." aidangan a nilaculan kasumamadan a luma' a kenis nu tuas a luma' Paiwan a binacadan kasumamadan a niyazu' "mal jeveq a pilisin"(śéíÁĀ£śóŹŚŹ§ś®ďťÉ®ŤźĹmal jeveqšļĒŚĻīÁ•≠) Dan-lin u cuyavuy, Pan-lin sakacascas i papaw nu Laiyi Lin-pan a sauwac Dan-lin piidangan u pilabinan a niyazu' Ta-zaw-cow u tademawan a taku"macapi ku Ku-lou a niyzau', tatengaay tini labu nu Sin-pi a kenis" Ta-hou a sauwac Yung-yang a cascas Laiyi tabakiay a helung Wang-yia, Wen-le u nusubelidan a tuud tu malumanay a niyazu' caay paazih Wan-yiya u pananulas u ngiha' Wen-le izaw ku adipangpang a helun kasumamadan nu malumanay a niyazu' kakitizaan pikayakayan tu buyu' a zazan a sakayakay Bang-ci a buyu' a pipazengan piazihan kasumamadan a tuud šļĆŚ≥įŚú≥ Paywan a binacadan u bihit nitutukan tu bitekan piidangan nu aadihan atu nu laylayay a nalaculan nu kasumamadan a kenis nu niyazu'ay sitaasay a lima' Paywan a binacadan u nu kasumamadan aniyazu' "mal jeveq" lima a mihcaan ku lisin (śéíÁĀ£śóŹŚŹ§ś®ďťÉ®ŤźĹmal jeveqšļĒŚĻīÁ•≠) Tan-lin nu micuyacuyay a sangaw, Tan-lin a masacascasay Laiyi i papaw nu Laiyi Lin-pan a sauwac Tan-lin pipahanhanan a aidangan Ta-hu-cew nu nalimaan anisanga tu taku "micapi tu sumamadan a niyazu', tatengaay tu i Sin-pimaylabuay a kenis" Tabakuay zukuzanay a sauwac kasasumidangn a cascas Laiyi Wang-ciy Wen-le kasumamadang Wang-ciy u śúõŚėČŚõěťü≥Ťį∑ Wen-le nu adibabangan a dadipisan nu kasumamadanŚŹ§ś®ďŤąäťÉ®ŤźĹťĀļŚĚÄ nu kasumamadan a kenis u sakatabuyu' a caculilan Ben-ci a buyu' kenis nu Pingtung i a kenis u nu banacadan a nalaylayan a luma' El-bun a cilisšļĆŚ≥įŚú≥ nu malumanay a kitizaan nu Paiwam a binacadan u bihit nu tademaw nidukdukan kananecan habayŚįŹÁĪ≥ cukanaŤäíśěú taliŤäčť†≠ kalitangŤäĪÁĒü tubahÁĒėŤó∑ susiziwÁõłśÄĚś®Ļ kamulś≤Ļś°ź daungś®ĻŤĪÜ u adasayan, Paiwan a kamu "Cinavu". i paylabu nu Paywan a kamu u tatangsayan u papah ku sapitabu u kakanan a tuud, u nu sapilisin aca a kakanan kuyni, u nu hapay, titi, tali ku satabu nu papah, kaw u nu hinalitih ku sasapisiket, huthuten taneng tu mukan, . izaw "ku nu Yun-ci-min a lalibungbung"saan. u nalimaan atu nituktukan nu Paywan a binacadan nu malumanay a kitizaan nu Paiwam a binacadan u bihit nu tademaw nidukdukan Qaqqayaman sasalisinan nu lim' i Wang-ciy malumanay a kenis hamin nu niyazu' tu sasalisinan a kakitizaan, yumahida Ci-mu a tademaw u lalekaln nu lala', sakay nu tawyaay nu nuyazu'ay paylabuay a pasing, u Ci-mu a tademaw dada' ku itiza misalisin a patungus, u mapalaway nu Paywan a binacadan ku tayzaay i sasalisinan a kakitizaan, miazih tu sasalisinan a luma' nulabuay u kuleng sasupet sakay u mahiniay a kawaw. u sibung nisalima'an a luma', qaqqayaman u salisinanay i luma'ay atu nu Lipunay a tayling a kakitizaan, u laed nu cacudadan u sakalalacalan, u daduducan nu casumamadan u paysinnan nu kakitizaan. u salisinan a luma' izaw ku cacayay masawahelulay nu ba'tu anicikcikan nisangaan u ahebal 2.4 mi, u labu 2.4 mi, u talakaw nu tetek 1.3 mi. sacumud i saamisan ku panan, i labu sa u naynayi' ku hica, nayi' ku nisalikliktan tu tuud nu nipazengan. . masazumaay a liwliw, sakay i kalimucu' satipan nu timulan izaw ku kibetulay tu 0.1 mi,masacacay i buyu' nu tebal nu salining sakusaan tu nupatizengan tu nu ba'tuay a sapal kusapisalining, i pabaw izaw ku nu tutukan tu masamataay nu tangah a tademaw. u salisinan a luma' tepal nu liwliw yumahiza kunikasaan 0.8 mi ku talakaw ani cikcikan tu ba'tu, nu lining masaliwit. saamisan izaw ku liwan nu cacayan ku sakatalabuan taeng sakatayza i niyazu'an a lumaluma'an.
S.PHON: r~…ĺaiji a sakuwan ku piŇčtuŇč. kumud nu kar~…ĺ…ôsakan, ***.** km*. (kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu r~…ĺinpanti **.** km*, kar~…ĺ…ôsakan nu pawr~…ĺiwti **.** km*), u kasabinawr~…ĺan, *,*** ku tad…ômaw. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sa, *,*** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. ir~…ĺabu nu kasanijazu Ē~ ° nu sijaŇč sa, *,*** ku iŇč ¶umin a tad…ômaw. u kasabinawr~…ĺan, pakar~…ĺatu **%(paiwan) ku kasabinawr~…ĺan. u paiwan ku sakar~…ĺanijazu Ē~ °. nikasakuwakuwan r~…ĺaiji mar~…ĺa * a ¶uw…ôn atu ** ku nijazu Ē~ °. kina ** a nijazu Ē~ °sa, kur~…ĺjar~…ĺjau , *uŇčar~…ĺid , pajr~…ĺjus , ¶ar~…ĺasi* , tjuwa*au , sir~…ĺj…ô*a*a* , tjana Ē~ °asija , pu ¶unug , tjar~…ĺja Ē~ °a*us , takamimura . r~…ĺaiji akuwan paiwan a kamu *ai, tini i tajwan r~…ĺabu nu piŇč-tuŇč akuwan tawar~…ĺian i t…ôpaŇč, nuamis na ¶api i taiwu a k…ônis, nuwar~…ĺian, nuwar~…ĺian ma ¶api i taituŇč akuwan dar…ôn a k…ônis, *inf…ôŇč a k…ônis, nutipan ma ¶api ku wanr~…ĺuan a k…ônis, sin-pj a k…ônis, nutipan nutimur~…ĺan patatur~…ĺiŇč tu faŇč-kiaw a k…ônis, mitur~…ĺa…ôs tu timur~…ĺan tu zuŇč-za a k…ônis, tad…ômaw izaw ku *.* ¶uja*uj, pan-r~…ĺin saka ¶as ¶as i papaw nu r~…ĺaiji r~…ĺin-pan a sauwa ¶ dan-r~…ĺin piidaŇčan u pir~…ĺabinan a nijazu Ē~ ° ta-zaw- ¶ow u tad…ômawan a taku"ma ¶api ku ku-r~…ĺou a nijzau Ē~ °, tat…ôŇčaaj tini r~…ĺabu nu sin-pi a k…ônis" ta-ńßou a sauwa ¶ juŇč-jaŇč a ¶as ¶as r~…ĺaiji tabakiaj a ńß…ôr~…ĺuŇč waŇč-jia, w…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô u nusub…ôr~…ĺidan a tuud tu mar~…ĺumanaj a nijazu Ē~ ° ¶aaj Ē~ °, tat…ôŇčaaj tu i sin-pimajr~…ĺabuaj a k…ônis" tabakuaj zukuzanaj a sauwa ¶ kasasumidaŇčn a ¶as ¶as r~…ĺaiji waŇč- ¶ij w…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô kasumamadaŇč waŇč- ¶ij u ***** w…ôn-r~…ĺ…ô nu adibabaŇčan a dadipisan nu kasumamadan******* nu kasumamadan a k…ônis u sakatabuju Ē~ ° a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan b…ôn- ¶i a buju Ē~ ° k…ônis nu piŇčtuŇč i a k…ônis u nu bana ¶adan a nar~…ĺajr~…ĺajan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° …ôr~…ĺ-bun a ¶ir~…ĺis*** nu mar~…ĺumanaj a kitizaan nu paiwam a bina ¶adan u bińßit nu tad…ômaw nidukdukan kanan…ô ¶an ńßabaj** ¶ukana** tar~…ĺi** kar~…ĺitaŇč** tubańß** susiziw*** kamur~…ĺ** dauŇč** u adasajan, paiwan a kamu " ¶ina*u". i pajr~…ĺabu nu pajwan a kamu u tataŇčsajan u papańß ku sapitabu u kakanan a tuud, u nu sapir~…ĺisin a ¶a a kakanan kujni, u nu ńßapaj, titi, tar~…ĺi ku satabu nu papańß, kaw u nu ńßinar~…ĺitińß ku sasapisik…ôt, ńßutńßut…ôn tan…ôŇč tu mukan, . izaw "ku nu jun- ¶i-min a r~…ĺar~…ĺibuŇčbuŇč"saan. u nar~…ĺimaan atu nituktukan nu pajwan a bina ¶adan nu mar~…ĺumanaj a kitizaan nu paiwam a bina ¶adan u bińßit nu tad…ômaw nidukdukan *a**ajaman sasar~…ĺisinan nu r~…ĺim Ē~ ° i waŇč- ¶ij mar~…ĺumanaj a k…ônis ńßamin nu nijazu Ē~ ° tu sasar~…ĺisinan a kakitizaan, jumańßida ¶i-mu a tad…ômaw u r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺn nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, sakaj nu tawjaaj nu nujazu Ē~ °aj pajr~…ĺabuaj a pasiŇč, u ¶i-mu a tad…ômaw dada Ē~ ° ku itiza misar~…ĺisin a patuŇčus, u mapar~…ĺawaj nu pajwan a bina ¶adan ku tajzaaj i sasar~…ĺisinan a kakitizaan, miazińß tu sasar~…ĺisinan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nur~…ĺabuaj u kur~…ĺ…ôŇč sasup…ôt sakaj u mańßiniaj a kawaw. u sibuŇč nisar~…ĺima Ē~ °an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, *a**ajaman u sar~…ĺisinanaj i r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj atu nu r~…ĺipunaj a tajr~…ĺiŇč a kakitizaan, u r~…ĺa…ôd nu ¶a ¶udadan u sakar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺan, u dadudu ¶an nu ¶asumamadan u pajsinnan nu kakitizaan. u sar~…ĺisinan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° izaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj masawańß…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺaj nu ba Ē~ °tu ani ¶ik ¶ikan nisaŇčaan u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ *.* mi, u r~…ĺabu *.* mi, u tar~…ĺakaw nu t…ôt…ôk *.* mi. sa ¶umud i saamisan ku panan, i r~…ĺabu sa u najnaji Ē~ ° ku ńßi ¶a, naji Ē~ ° ku nisar~…ĺikr~…ĺiktan tu tuud nu nipaz…ôŇčan. . masazumaaj a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, sakaj i kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° satipan nu timur~…ĺan izaw ku kib…ôtur~…ĺaj tu *.* mi,masa ¶a ¶aj i buju Ē~ ° nu t…ôbar~…ĺ nu sar~…ĺiniŇč sakusaan tu nupatiz…ôŇčan tu nu ba Ē~ °tuaj a sapar~…ĺ kusapisar~…ĺiniŇč, i pabaw izaw ku nu tutukan tu masamataaj nu taŇčańß a tad…ômaw. u sar~…ĺisinan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° t…ôpar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw jumańßiza kunikasaan *.* mi ku tar~…ĺakaw ani ¶ik ¶ikan tu ba Ē~ °tu, nu r~…ĺiniŇč masar~…ĺiwit. saamisan izaw ku r~…ĺiwan nu ¶a ¶ajan ku sakatar~…ĺabuan ta…ôŇč sakatajza i nijazu Ē~ °an a r~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an.
